commands.review_summary:
The PR snapshots active global-prefix OpenClaw host dependencies around managed npm plugin installs, repairs the active host package at the same version when dependencies disappear, rolls back on repair failure, and adds focused npm-root tests.

PR surface: Source +227, Tests +216. Total +443 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction is present. Source inspection and the PR's modeled regression tests make the current-main gap clear, but the affected real global-prefix npm install path was not exercised here.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because this draft protected-label PR needs the verifier fix and real global-prefix npm proof before merge; automation cannot supply the contributor's environment proof.
